_comment: AFlix remote config — host this file on GitHub at a public raw URL. The HTML never contains your API key.

servers._comment: VidCore — most reliable right now, 14+ internal servers, HLS, multi-server auto-failover, subtitles, TMDB native.
servers.name: VidCore

servers._comment: vidsrc.mov — clean player, multi-server failover, 1080p, TMDB+IMDB, consistently up.
servers.name: VidSrc

servers._comment: VidSpark — fast, free, no registration, TMDB+IMDB, good library coverage.
servers.name: VidSpark

servers._comment: SuperEmbed — 10+ servers, TMDB+IMDB, massive library, one of the longest-running free embed APIs.
servers.name: SuperEmbed

servers._comment: VidBinge — fast, TMDB+IMDB, solid uptime, good fallback option.
servers.name: VidBinge

_consumet_note: All servers are iframe-based embed players using TMDB IDs. Ordered by current reliability — try VidCore first, fall back down the list.
